comments: Full two-hour show, with 57 minutes of Iron Maiden's headline set live from Donington 1988

Introduction – “Well hello there, this is TV on the radio, Thomas Vance, the music vendor and welcome to The Friday Rock Show. Right mate, tonight, the highlight of this programme has got to be the Iron Maiden 1988 Donington session, I’ve got loads of material, it’s 57 minutes long that set, it should be coming up in, well, I’ll tell you after this… Just done the mathematics, I reckon something like 34, 35 minutes’ time, the tracks that Maiden will perform are these; Moonchild, The Prisoner, Wrathchild, Infinite Dreams, Trooper, Heaven Can Wait, Clairvoyant, Seventh Son, Number of the Beast, Hallowed Be Thy Name and Iron Maiden… The highlight of tonight’s rock show, Donington 1988, but we start with this mob:”

track_listing.track: Competition – What was the content of the Friday Rock Show when it opened up ten years ago – Postcards to 'Ten Years of Thud'...
